Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. From Üsküdar Square, get off at Bağlarbaşı-Altunizade with Kadıköy buses and minibuses. İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. 500 m after reaching the Guest House.
